plugins.name: dotclaudefiles
plugins.description: My personal Claude Code configuration packaged as a plugin. Includes commands, agents, skills, and configs I use daily.

plugins.name: claude-management
plugins.description: Memory-file management and self-improvement harness for Claude Code: rulify, claudify, remember, end-session, transcript mining into project skills/rules (stabilize), and suggestion-only hooks with a practice-verifier quality gate.

plugins.name: dotclaudehooks
plugins.description: Personal collection of hooks for daily development

plugins.name: document-api
plugins.description: Set of skills to document API rest endpoints & socket events

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Retrofit testing pipeline for existing code: measure testability, break dependencies with seams, write characterization + behavior tests, and audit test quality via mutation-thinking. Runs autonomously inside a dedicated worktree.

plugins.name: typescript-migration
plugins.description: Autonomous TypeScript migration pipeline for JavaScript codebases: audits the project, installs tooling, renames files leaf-first with git mv, extracts shared types, runs parallel per-chunk typers with ctx7 and LSP support, then consolidates with progressive strict-mode checks and a final build gate. Runs autonomously inside a dedicated worktree.

plugins.name: git-toolkit
plugins.description: Git workflow toolkit: commit standards enforcement (staged deliberately, linted, message format with explicit approval), branch naming conventions, and rebase conflict resolution guided by intent analysis from both branches' history.

plugins.name: domain-restructure
plugins.description: Autonomous structural refactor that reshapes a codebase from layer-first into feature-first screaming architecture (modules/<domain>/<layer>). Applies strategic DDD to discover bounded contexts, classify subdomains, then relocate files and rewrite imports with zero functional change inside a dedicated worktree.

plugins.name: spec-kit
plugins.description: Spec-driven workflow toolkit: author closed, self-contained specs, harden their design through a fresh-auditor closure loop (closed-design-enforcer), then dispatch implementation across write-directly, agent-waves, and workflow strategies. Pairs with the /goal command.
